title: Generating a Basic SQL Query
scenario: Write a prompt that gets an LLM to generate a basic SQL query to retrieve all employees from a company with a salary above $50,000. The query should be well-formatted and use proper SQL syntax.
constraints: Must be a well-formatted SQL query

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated query meets the formatting and syntax requirements.
Verifies the query uses proper SQL syntax.
